steps.title: Find the rate of change
steps.content:
Use two rows from the table. When $s$ increases from $3$ to $6$, $P$ increases from $8$ to $18$.
$$m=\frac{18-8}{6-3}=\frac{10}{3}$$

steps.title: Find the constant term
steps.content:
Use the point $(3,8)$ in the linear model $$P=\frac{10}{3}s+b$$
$$8=\frac{10}{3}(3)+b$$
$$8=10+b$$
$$b=-2$$

steps.title: Write the linear model
steps.content: The relationship is $$P=\frac{10}{3}s-2$$ The answer is C.
